CheckTitle: Ensure MFA is required for all users via Conditional Access
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy enforces MFA for all users across all cloud apps.
Risk: Without universal MFA enforcement, compromised credentials allow direct account takeover. This was the exact attack vector in the Midnight Blizzard breach.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy targeting All Users with All Cloud Apps scope and MFA grant control.
